# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Security updates are provided for the latest release line.

| Version | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| v1.4.X | :white_check_mark: |
| Older releases | :x: |

If you use an older version, please concider updating. We are not responsible for any security vulnerability that happens on unsupported versions.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please **do not** open public issues for security vulnerabilities.
Report security issues privately by emailing the maintainer at [security@szabee.me](mailto:security@szabee.me), or by using [GitHub private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/SzaBee13/double-doors-server/security/advisories/new).

When reporting, include:

- A clear description of the issue
- Reproduction steps and server/plugin versions
- Potential impact
- Any proof-of-concept details

You can expect an initial acknowledgement within 3 days.
